calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2024 Continued To Jun-25-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to June 25, 2024, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Continued To Apr-23-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar May-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel As to Plaintiff Dajon Edwards.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Counsel Justin Farahi and Farahi Law Firm, APC's motion to be relieved as counsel, which is unopposed, is GRANTED.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
